error_signature: if statement not transforming into a weweb formula
title: Incorrect if statement format in pricing toggle
symptom: The toggle for changing subscription pricing between monthly and yearly does not work as expected due to a formatting issue in the if statement.
applies_when: Using a toggle to switch between pricing options
Binding the toggle to a formula
not_this_if: The toggle works correctly in other scenarios
root_cause: The if statement in the formula is incorrectly formatted due to an extra space between 'if' and the opening bracket. This prevents the formula from being recognized and executed properly by WeWeb.
fix_steps: Locate the if statement in your formula
Remove any spaces between 'if' and the opening bracket
agent_instruction: Correct the formatting of the if statement in your pricing toggle formula.
